mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clazz(name, room, begin_date, end_date, subject, create_time, update_time ,master_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{subject}, NOW(),NOW(),#{masterId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, room, begin_date AS beginDate, end_date AS endDate, master_id AS masterId, subject AS subject, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM clazz WHERE id = #{id}
